So we know that people are very frustrated at flight being canceled all the
time. What, what have you done to address these issues?

regions. So, earlier this year, we announced, um, some
funding from the Regional Infrastructure Fund for regional air connectivity,
so that's to enable, uh, regional airlines to invest in their own
